qna_pairs.Query: What is the best way to cook clams?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Ideally, cooking clams quickly or over low heat is best. When cooking whole hard-shell clams, a good indicator of doneness is when the shell open up. Overcooking clams will make the flesh tough and unappetizing.

qna_pairs.Query: What types of clams can be used in different dishes?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Some tender varieties may be eaten raw, either right out of their shells or as sashimi. Shucked clam meat can also be cooked and incorporated into a variety of dishes. Fried and stuffed clams are eaten in the United States, along with clam chowder. Pasta alla vongole is an Italian dish of clams and pasta.

qna_pairs.Query: How do I select the best clams?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Clams should be live, with tightly closed shells for hard-shell clams or open shells for varieties that never close completely. They should also be stored properly in the fridge or freezer to maintain freshness.
